title: Simple Parkour
description: This mod allows you to easily wall jump, long jump, wall run, and more!
body:
This mod adds **5** new ways to move in Minecraft!

## Mechanics and Controls:

**Wall run: by running against a wall (while off the ground), you can wall run. This makes you fall slower and enables the wall jump ability.**

**Wall jump: By jumping while wall running, you will be pushed up and away from the wall you are currently at.**

**Long jump: Simply by tapping shift while running (must be on ground), you can jump across 8 blocks! Keep in mind that you won't jump high enough to go up a block.**

**Tactical land: Just press shift while falling. you'll take less fall damage.**

**Vaulting. If you are at the edge of a wall, you can jump again to get up it.**
 
## Extra Information:

This mod DOES work with multiplayer, however, there are no animations so it may look a little goofy.
